summary: Frontend-only testing of editable greeting/brand name feature. All 11 scenarios from the review request PASS. Fresh install shows 'Hi, Guest' in dashboard and sidebar; pencil-edit opens focused input; save via button and Enter both work; Escape restores previous name; empty/whitespace input falls back to 'Guest'; persistence across reload verified; mobile top bar shows 'Hi, {name}' with no pencil UI, and rupee logo/Ledger/PERSONAL FINANCE branding is removed; H1 typography classes preserved (font-display text-4xl sm:text-5xl tracking-tight font-medium); regression navigation to Planned/Calendar/History/Reports/Settings works; set budget flow works; nav-settings-mobile works.
critical_code_review_comments: Non-blocking recharts console warnings about width(-1)/height(-1) on hidden panels during route transitions (pre-existing, not introduced by this change).
Known eslint react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warning about setUserName in useMemo deps — harmless, consistent with other mutations in the file.
seed_data_creation: None (fresh install performed via IndexedDB deletion).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editable greeting works end-to-end. Cloud sync is DISABLED (env vars empty) — see settings page banner.
